title: dodonaea lanceolata
intro: Dodonaea lanceolata, also known as the broad-leaved hop-bush or Australian hop-bush, is a plant species native to the eastern coast of Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Dodonaea lanceolata include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams made from the plant's leaves and bark.
